rules.freeze: Gate Zero is invalid until frozen=true with decider sign-off (ADR-0000, plan row 0.3). Corpus changes after kickoff void the measurement (PRD 1.3). One artifact, one name: every gate measures against this file only.
rules.g1_hosts: G1 must pass independently on every host listed under hardware with role=performance. No averaging, no host substitution.
rules.subsets: Gates reference declared subsets by name; born_digital is the G1 subset. G3 runs on the full corpus.

freeze_record.corpus_owner: Gate Zero decider (interim, transfers to benchmark/devrel when staffed)

subsets: born_digital | security | failure | fonts | rotation | tables | multi_column

windows_x64_note: Windows x64 joins nightly determinism no later than Milestone B exit (week 8); unresolved divergence blocks or re-scopes Public Beta.
